projects.title: Villa Al Ansab
projects.description: A warm, contemporary facade designed to harmonise with the Omani landscape while asserting a bold modern identity.
projects.overview: A contemporary two-storey villa defined by clean cubic volumes and a warm, tactile material palette. The facade balances bold modern geometry with the soft tones of the Omani landscape — microcement surfaces in off-white and warm beige, framed by dark aluminium and recessed linear lighting that brings the architecture to life after dusk.

slides.caption: The villa at dusk — interlocking cubic volumes wrapped in warm microcement, where concealed linear LED lighting traces the architecture and gives the facade a quiet, glowing presence against the evening sky.
A study in detail: the crisp meeting of off-white and warm beige microcement, dark aluminium window frames, and a recessed linear light that washes warmth down the soffit.
The material story — microcement in off-white and warm beige, paired with dark aluminium framing and glass. Each surface was chosen to age gracefully and sit in harmony with its surroundings.

The full material language of the project: warm beige microcement, dark aluminium frames, advanced clear glazing, and linear LED lighting — assembled into a facade that is both timeless and unmistakably modern.

sections.title: Concept & Massing
sections.description: The design emerges from a study of the Omani vernacular — interlocking cubic volumes that create shadow and depth in the harsh afternoon sun. Each form was positioned deliberately to frame internal courtyards and capture the prevailing breeze, balancing openness with the need for privacy and shade.

renders.caption: The villa at dusk — interlocking cubic volumes wrapped in warm microcement, where concealed linear LED lighting traces the architecture and gives the facade a quiet, glowing presence against the evening sky.
A study in detail: the crisp meeting of off-white and warm beige microcement, dark aluminium window frames, and a recessed linear light that washes warmth down the soffit.

sections.title: Material Language
sections.description: Every material was selected for its ability to age gracefully in the Omani climate. Microcement in two tones — off-white and warm beige — forms the primary skin, while dark aluminium frames define the apertures with precision. Advanced clear glazing maximises daylight without sacrificing thermal performance.

renders.caption: The material story — microcement in off-white and warm beige, paired with dark aluminium framing and glass. Each surface was chosen to age gracefully and sit in harmony with its surroundings.

sections.title: Night Presence
sections.description: Concealed linear LED lighting was integrated into every horizontal soffit, transforming the facade after dusk. The lighting traces the geometry of the volumes, creating a warm, glowing presence that reads as unmistakably modern yet quietly restrained.

renders.caption: The full material language of the project: warm beige microcement, dark aluminium frames, advanced clear glazing, and linear LED lighting — assembled into a facade that is both timeless and unmistakably modern.

projects.title: Office and Work Space Design
projects.description: An industrial-modern headquarters for MERJAS — open collaborative zones, private offices, and warm material accents within a raw, refined shell.
projects.overview: A complete office and workspace design for MERJAS, balancing an industrial architectural language with warmth and brand identity. Exposed metal-grid ceilings, microcement walls, and black-steel glazing are softened by warm timber, integrated planting, and curated lighting — organised into clear zones for management, open work, a coffee bar, and a branded reception lounge.

sections.title: Reception & Lounge
sections.description: The arrival experience sets the tone — an industrial-luxe lounge carrying the MERJAS identity, with warm accent lighting, microcement walls, and bespoke crate seating that nods directly to the brand's world.

renders.caption: The MERJAS lounge — brand signage, warm accent lighting, and bespoke crate seating that ties the space to the company's identity.

sections.title: Open Office & Meeting
sections.description: At the heart of the plan, a glass-framed meeting volume sits within the open office. The metal-grid ceiling and black-steel partitions define the space, while warm timber and soft task lighting keep it inviting.

renders.caption: The open office and meeting zone — an industrial metal-grid ceiling and black-steel glass partitions wrap warm timber desks, balanced by soft, considered task lighting.

sections.title: Management Office
sections.description: A private office for leadership, framed in black-steel glazing for transparency without losing focus. Warm timber joinery and the brand identity set into a microcement wall give the room quiet authority.

renders.caption: A private management office framed in black-steel glazing, with warm timber joinery and the MERJAS identity set into a microcement feature wall.

sections.title: Open Workspace
sections.description: The team works across paired timber desks with ergonomic seating, organised around a central planted spine that brings life and air to the raw industrial shell.

renders.caption: The open workspace — paired timber desks, ergonomic seating, and integrated planting bring warmth to the raw industrial shell.
Rows of collaborative desks anchored by a central planted spine, lit evenly beneath the exposed metal-grid ceiling.

sections.title: Coffee Bar
sections.description: An informal zone for breaks and casual meetings — a long communal table beneath cascading pendant lights, set against concrete walls and open shelving.

renders.caption: The coffee bar and informal meeting zone — a long communal table beneath cascading pendant lights, set against concrete and open shelving.

sections.title: Floor Plan
sections.description: The full layout resolves into eight clearly defined zones, each shaped around how the team actually moves and works through the day.

renders.caption: The full floor plan — management and accounting offices, conference room, open office area, secretary station, lounge, coffee bar, and restroom.

projects.title: Outdoor Terrace & Pergola
projects.description: An outdoor sanctuary that extends the living space — bespoke pergola structure, soft landscaping, and shaded seating areas.
projects.overview: An outdoor sanctuary that extends the living space beyond the walls — a bespoke pergola structure, soft landscaping, and carefully positioned shaded seating areas create a private retreat suited to Oman's climate.

slides.caption: A bespoke outdoor terrace and pergola designed to extend the living space — shaded, landscaped, and built for the Omani climate.

projects.title: Master Bedroom & Dressing Suite
projects.description: A serene retreat designed around the client's daily ritual — generous proportions, integrated storage, and soft tonal palette.
projects.overview: A serene retreat designed entirely around the client's daily ritual. Generous proportions, fully integrated storage, and a carefully considered soft tonal palette come together to create a bedroom and dressing suite that feels effortlessly calm.

slides.caption: Master bedroom and dressing suite — generous proportions, integrated joinery, and a soft tonal palette crafted around the client's daily ritual.

projects.title: Master Bathroom Transformation
projects.description: A complete transformation combining marble, gold fixtures, and bespoke joinery. Every surface speaks to refined luxury and functional precision.
projects.overview: A complete bathroom transformation that marries marble surfaces, brushed gold fixtures, and bespoke joinery into a single coherent language. Every finish was chosen to speak of refined luxury while remaining entirely functional in daily use.

slides.caption: A master bathroom transformation — marble, brushed gold fixtures, and bespoke joinery combined into a space of refined luxury and functional precision.
